name: Rocket Fuel Inc.
description: Rocket Fuel Inc. is a leading programmatic media-buying platform provider that uses artificial intelligence and big data to predict the best performing user and placement for an ad. Founded in 2008, the company offers a Programmatic Marketing Platform with a Demand Side Platform (DSP) and a Data Management Platform (DMP) to help brands and agencies optimize their digital advertising campaigns across web, mobile, video, and social channels. Rocket Fuel was acquired by Sizmek in 2017.
